description_long: This house is a modern, flat-roofed residential building with a clean, geometric design and a predominantly white exterior. The structure features large windows, some with balcony railings, and a mix of open and enclosed spaces, including a small courtyard or garden area. The property is set within a paved lot that includes marked parking spaces and landscaped areas with trees and shrubs. A secondary, smaller building or garage is visible near the entrance, separated by a driveway and pedestrian walkway. The house is bordered by wide streets, suggesting an urban or suburban neighborhood context. The overall layout emphasizes accessibility, minimalism, and integration with outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white house with large windows, parking spaces, and landscaped areas, set within an urban street layout. The design is geometric and minimalist, with a mix of open and enclosed spaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, parking spaces, landscaped trees, and a small secondary building near the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the house, additional windows, and the continuation of the parking lot and greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a large flat roof, enclosed courtyard, and the separation between the main and secondary structures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the back parking area, garden, and the main building's rear facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and balcony railings
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide glass doors, adjacent landscaping, and a paved walkway
